netutil 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 netutil

  echo-server       Server which echoes data back to client.

  proxy-server      Proxy server with optional data logging.

  receive-client    Receive data from remote server.

  help              Display more information on a specific command.

commands.payload:
netutil 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 netutil

  echo-server       Server which echoes data back to client.

  proxy-server      Proxy server with optional data logging.

  receive-client    Receive data from remote server.

  help              Display more information on a specific command.

  version           Display version information.

result.stderr:
netutil 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 netutil

  -b, --bind              Required. End point to bind to, e.g. 0.0.0.0:5000.

  -p, --protocol          IP protocol. Either Tcp or Udp.

  -f, --format            Data format (for rendering in console/event log).

  -d, --display-data      Write data to console.

  -e, --event-log-file    Event log file path.

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.
